note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.dfn.fracture module functions.

method_groups.normal: normal, normal_x, normal_y, normal_z, set_normal, set_normal_x, set_normal_y, set_normal_z
method_groups.pos: pos, pos_x, pos_y, pos_z, set_pos, set_pos_x, set_pos_y, set_pos_z

methods.name: aperture
methods.description: Get the fracture aperture.

methods.name: area
methods.description: Get the fracture area.

methods.name: contact_count
methods.description: Get the number of contacts associated with this fracture. If the optional keyword argument type is given, the count is limited to the contact types specified. The optional type keyword argument should be a Python type object (one of: itasca.BallBallContact, itasca.BallPebbleContact, itasca.PebblePebbleContact, itasca.BallFacetContact or itasca.PebbleFacetContact). If the optional keyword argument all is True the count includes virtual contacts.

methods.name: contacts
methods.signature: fracture.contacts(all=False, type=None) -> tuple of Contact objects
methods.description: Get a tuple of contacts associated with this fracture. If the optional keyword argument type is given, the returned list is limited to the contact types specified. The type keyword argument should be a Python type object (one of: itasca.BallBallContact, itasca.BallPebbleContact, itasca.PebblePebbleContact, itasca.BallFacetContact or itasca.PebbleFacetContact). If the (optional) keyword argument all is True the returned list includes virtual contacts.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Delete this fracture.

methods.name: dfn
methods.description: Get the dfn to which this fracture belongs.

methods.name: diameter
methods.description: Get the fracture diameter.

methods.name: dip
methods.description: Get the fracture dip.

methods.name: dipdir
methods.description: Get the fracture dip direction.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the fracture extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the fracture group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: fracture.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the fracture. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this fracture is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: has_prop
methods.description: Returns True if the fracture has the given surface property.

methods.name: id
methods.description: Get the fracture id.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: fracture.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the fracture is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: intersections
methods.signature: fracture.intersections(DFN object) -> tuple of Intersection objects
methods.description: Get the intersections with this fracture. An optional DFN object can be specified to limit the intersections to fractures belonging to that dfn.

methods.name: intersects
methods.description: Get a boolean indicating the intersection status of the given fracture with this fracture.

methods.name: isdisk
methods.description: Get the fracture disk status.

methods.name: normal
methods.description: Get the fracture normal (vector).

methods.name: normal_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the fracture normal.

methods.name: normal_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the fracture normal.

methods.name: normal_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the fracture normal.

methods.name: point_near
methods.description: Get the point on the fracture closest to the given point (vector).

methods.name: pos
methods.description: Get the fracture location (vector).

methods.name: pos_x
methods.description: Get the x-component of the fracture location.

methods.name: pos_y
methods.description: Get the y-component of the fracture location.

methods.name: pos_z
methods.description: Get the z-component of the fracture location.

methods.name: prop
methods.description: Get a surface property value of this fracture.

methods.name: props
methods.description: Get a dictionary of all the surface properties of this fracture.

methods.name: set_aperture
methods.description: Set the fracture aperture.

methods.name: set_area
methods.description: Set the fracture area.

methods.name: set_diameter
methods.description: Set the fracture diameter.

methods.name: set_dip
methods.description: Set the fracture dip.

methods.name: set_dipdir
methods.description: Set the fracture dip direction.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the fracture extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: fracture.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the fracture group name in a given slot.

methods.name: set_normal
methods.description: Set the fracture normal (vector).

methods.name: set_normal_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the fracture normal.

methods.name: set_normal_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the fracture normal.

methods.name: set_normal_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the fracture normal.

methods.name: set_pos
methods.description: Set the fracture location (vector).

methods.name: set_pos_x
methods.description: Set the x-component of the fracture location.

methods.name: set_pos_y
methods.description: Set the y-component of the fracture location.

methods.name: set_pos_z
methods.description: Set the z-component of the fracture location.

methods.name: set_prop
methods.description: Set a surface property of this fracture.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this fracture is live.

methods.name: vertices
methods.description: Get the vertices of this fracture.
